infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take pictures for registration.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to show your position on the map and match you with nearby trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs your location, including in the background, to keep your position updated on the map and match you with nearby trips while driving.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow this app to access your camera to take pictures for registration.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app needs your location to show your position on the map and match you with nearby trips.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs your location, including in the background, to keep your position updated on the map and match you with nearby trips while driving.
